title: The silent forest: siren head
description: You find yourself lost in a forest. You aren't sure where you are, you aren't sure where to go, and you hear a strange siren in the distance. A creature made of horror: siren head, is said to be found in these woods.
body:
Need a server? Click [HERE](https://bisecthosting.com/kamussy) to get one 25% off!

---

**Search tags:** horror, scary, modpack, siren head, sirenhead, forest, terrifying, psychological

---

If you have any complaints, comments, or suggestions (or if you need people to play with), please join the [Discord server](https://discord.gg/fYrff3FXG3)

---

You find yourself lost in a forest with no signs of life. You've been trapped here for days, and you aren't sure how to escape, but all you can do for now is survive. With no human life for who knows how far, it is up to you and your group to venture through the forest and fight for your survival. After days of surviving, you start to hear some strange sirens and static in the distance. You choose to flee, but the noises won't go away. After curiosity gets the best of you, you venture toward the sirens. When you finally get close enough, you see that there is a massive, slender, and tall being standing there; it has a human-like body, but sirens for a head.


This modpack uses essentials mod for multiplayer, and simple voice chat for proximity voice chat.

---

Modpack description:

This modpack's primary mod is siren head. and is sure to give you many scares. The entire map is a forest. Abandoned buildings, campsites, and other structures can also be found in the world. Other mods, such as blur, better fog, drip sounds, sodium/embeddium dynamic lights, and sound physics remastered are also added to create an eerie ambiance. If you'd like to add any mods or shader packs, feel free to do so.

---

I do not own any of these mods. All credit goes to the owners.
